about.appSummary: VidMirror is a feature-rich video processing application with support for multiple AI provider integrations.
about.subtitle: Application information and version
about.title: About

model.fetchingModels: Fetching model list from provider API…
model.noModels: This provider has no available models
model.noMatchDesc: Try adjusting the keyword or switching the capability filter
model.noProviders: No providers found. Please add configuration in "Provider Management" first
model.subtitle: View models supported by each provider
model.title: Model Management

defaultText.active: Current default text model (click again to clear)

defaultVision.active: Current default vision model (click again to clear)

network.title: Network Settings
network.subtitle: Configure global parameters for external network access and media download
network.proxyDescription: HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy for accessing overseas platforms. Leave empty for direct connection
network.proxySupport: Supports http:// or socks5:// protocols, only effective during media fetching
network.poTokenSectionDescription: YouTube anti-bot credentials; leave empty to use defaults. Usually filled together with Visitor Data
network.cookieSectionDescription: yt-dlp scans the following absolute paths line by line for cookies.txt / bilibili_cookies.txt
network.cookieDirsPlaceholder:
One absolute path per line, for example:
/Users/you/cookies
/data/cookies
network.cookieDirsDescription: Leave empty to use built-in default directories. You can place cookies.txt or bilibili_cookies.txt in these directories

download.title: Download Settings
download.subtitle: Configure storage path, filename template, network proxy and concurrency parameters for media downloads
download.storageDescription: Configure storage location and naming rules for media files
download.outputDirHint: Leave empty to use default directory (data/videos/)
download.filenameTemplateHint: Use yt-dlp template syntax, such as %(title)s / %(id)s / %(uploader)s, etc.
download.networkDescription: Configure network proxy, YouTube credentials and cookie directories
download.proxyHint: Download-specific proxy; leave empty to use global proxy settings
download.cookieDirsHint: yt-dlp scans following paths line by line for cookies.txt or bilibili_cookies.txt
download.advancedDescription: Configure concurrency limit, retry count and timeout parameters
download.concurrencyLimitHint: Number of fragments downloaded simultaneously, range 1-8, default 2
download.retryCountHint: Number of retries on connection failure, range 0-10, default 3
download.socketTimeoutHint: Network connection timeout, range 5-300 seconds, default 30

screenshot.title: Video Screenshot
screenshot.subtitle: Configure default parameters for frame extraction, montage and vision understanding

interval.title: Default Frame Interval
interval.description: How often (in seconds) to extract a key frame

grid.title: Grid Montage Size
grid.description: Select grid size. 3x3 is recommended for balanced performance and quality

quality.title: Image Quality
quality.description: Higher quality results in larger file sizes

embed.title: Auto Embed in Notes
embed.description: Whether to automatically include screenshot grids when generating notes

transcriber.title: Audio Transcription
transcriber.subtitle: Configure speech recognition engine and default parameters (ASR Provider)

engine.title: Transcription Engine
engine.description: Select the engine to use for audio transcription

description.fastWhisper: Free local transcription, fast but requires local resources, supports offline mode
description.bcut: Bilibili's online service, no local resources needed, requires internet
description.kuaishou: Kuaishou online service, no local resources needed, requires internet
description.groq: Groq cloud service, fast and efficient, requires API Key
description.mlxWhisper: Apple Silicon optimized version, only available for Mac chipsets

tosWarning.bcut: By using Bilibili's online service, your audio will be sent to Bilibili's servers for processing. Please ensure you have read and agreed to Bilibili's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
tosWarning.kuaishou: By using Kuaishou's online service, your audio will be sent to Kuaishou's servers for processing. Please ensure you have read and agreed to Kuaishou's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
tosWarning.groq: By using Groq's cloud service, your audio will be sent to Groq's servers for processing. Please ensure you have read and agreed to Groq's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

initialPrompt.title: Initial Prompt
initialPrompt.description: Used to guide ASR recognition, e.g., technical terms, proper names
initialPrompt.label: Prompt
initialPrompt.hint: Only effective with Faster Whisper engine

transcriber.mlxNotAvailable: MLX Whisper is only supported on macOS, automatically switched to Faster Whisper

device.title: Compute Device
device.description: Select compute device for transcription (CPU or GPU)
device.label: Device

dirty.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.hint: Existing API keys are only overwritten when a non-empty value is submitted.

emptyState.title: No providers yet
emptyState.description: Click "Add" in the top right to connect OpenAI / Anthropic / Google / Ollama, etc.

monitor.title: Deployment Monitor
monitor.subtitle: Live backend service status, system resource usage and runtime logs

stats.title: System Metrics
stats.description: CPU / Memory / Disk usage (refreshed every 5 seconds)

logs.title: Runtime Logs
logs.description: Recent backend task logs (virtual scrolling, up to 5000 lines)
